title: PublishedComponentSet
description: A node containing a set of variants of a component.

key.description: The unique identifier for the component set.

fileKey.description: The unique identifier of the Figma file that contains the component set.

nodeId.description: The unique identifier of the component set node within the Figma file.

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the component set.

name.description: The name of the component set.

description.description: The description of the component set as entered by the publisher.

createdAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time when the component set was created.

updatedAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time when the component set was last updated.
